title: koeleria × pseudoglauca subsp. csatoi
intro: Koeleria × pseudoglauca subsp. csatoi is a hybrid plant species of the genus Koeleria, commonly known as June grass. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. This plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues. Koeleria × pseudoglauca subsp. csatoi can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
